name: coder-tools
description: Read-only Coder MCP access for workspaces, templates, tasks, files, and logs.

interface.shortDescription: Read-only Coder deployment inspection through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Coder Tools runs the local Coder CLI MCP server using the device's existing Coder login. A process-level allowlist exposes only read-only workspace, template, task, file, application, forwarding, and log inspection tools.
defaultPrompt: Inspect my Coder workspaces, templates, tasks, or logs without changing them.
